summary: A new daughter-in-law hides her powerful fart from shame, then uses the mighty wind to shake pears from a high tree and earn affectionate belonging.

adaptationVersions.plannedAlternate: External editor pass after children’s editorial and Korean-language review
adaptationVersions.note: Generated repo-local repair draft; not external human final.

sensitivityNotes: Comic body humor removes shame instead of humiliating the young woman.
Repaired by repo-local semantic authenticity pass; external children’s editor, Korean-language, cultural, and child-safety review remain required before final release.

text.enLittle: The new daughter-in-law folded blankets so neatly even the corners looked shy.
text.enStandard: In the sunny courtyard, first, the new daughter-in-law folded blankets so neatly even the corners looked shy. "I will answer carefully," came the reply.
